creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Mon May 27 02:16:43 2013
New Revision: 319150
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319150

Log:
  Device templates for use with devmon.
  
  WWW: http://devmon.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:		ports/176428
  Submitted by:	Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>

Added:
  head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/
  head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/Makefile

Modified: head/net-mgmt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/Makefile	Mon May 27 02:13:58 2013	(r319149)
+++ head/net-mgmt/Makefile	Mon May 27 02:16:43 2013	(r319150)
@@ -55,6 +55,7 @@
     SUBDIR += cricket
     SUBDIR += darkstat
     SUBDIR += devmon
+    SUBDIR += devmon-templates
     SUBDIR += dhcdrop
     SUBDIR += disco
     SUBDIR += docsis

Added: head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/Makefile	Mon May 27 02:16:43 2013	(r319150)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	devmon-templates
+DISTVERSION=	20080206
+CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/devmon/${PORTNAME}/templates/
+
+MAINTAINER=	feld@feld.me
+COMMENT=	Device templates for use with devmon
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	devmon>0:${PORTSDIR}/net-mgmt/devmon
+
+NO_BUILD=	yes
+
+do-install:
+	${INSTALL} -d ${PREFIX}/devmon/templates/
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${PREFIX}/devmon/templates/)
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/distinfo	Mon May 27 02:16:43 2013	(r319150)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (devmon-templates-20080206.tar.gz) = 5bfdc15d6e628438aa75a4a65314fc71a83d9043bbb8789321a56556024b5e76
+SIZE (devmon-templates-20080206.tar.gz) = 105617

Added: head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net-mgmt/devmon-templates/pkg-descr	Mon May 27 02:16:43 2013	(r319150)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Device templates for use with devmon.
+
+WWW: http://devmon.sourceforge.net/
